changelog: Tighter volume tolerance: preview checks now use a 0.1% default (was 0.5%).
Ranked verification is geometry (volume) only; no material needed.
Mass is computed from the level's density and shown in its units.
Added an unranked practice mass check and a reference-cube self-check.
Tighter volume tolerance: default checksum band is now 0.1% (was 0.5%).
Ranked verification is geometry (volume) only; material never gates.
Mass computed from the level's density (Load level), not your part's material.
Practice mass check, reference-cube self-check, and an optional material advisory.
Fail-safe modeling telemetry: live in-run analysis and a post-run coaching report.
